summary: Tested P0 features: Initial Setup Page and Product Selection Flow. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified including setup redirect, products page empty state, supplier detail with selection banner, category buttons, and full product selection flow.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/setup/status returns correct structure (is_configured, has_database, has_superadmin)
Backend: GET /api/setup/status returns true for all flags when app is configured
Backend: POST /api/setup/test-connection requires mongo_url
Backend: POST /api/setup/test-connection returns error for invalid URL
Backend: POST /api/setup/configure rejects when superadmin exists
Backend: GET /api/products/selected-count returns selection statistics
Backend: GET /api/products/selected-count filters by supplier_id
Backend: GET /api/supplier/{id}/products includes is_selected field
Backend: GET /api/supplier/{id}/categories returns selected_count per category
Backend: POST /api/products/select marks products as selected
Backend: POST /api/products/deselect marks products as deselected
Backend: POST /api/products/select returns 400 for empty list
Backend: POST /api/products/deselect returns 400 for empty list
Backend: POST /api/products/select-by-supplier selects all products from supplier
Backend: POST /api/products/select-by-supplier filters by category
Backend: POST /api/products/select-by-supplier returns 404 for invalid supplier
Backend: POST /api/products/select-by-supplier returns 400 without supplier_id
Backend: GET /api/products-unified shows only selected products by default
Backend: GET /api/products-unified with include_all=true shows all products
Backend: GET /api/products-unified/count respects selection filter
Backend: Setup endpoints are public (no auth required)
Backend: Product selection endpoints require authentication
Frontend: Setup page redirects to /login when app is configured
Frontend: Products page shows empty state with 'Ir a Proveedores' button
Frontend: Products page shows message to go to Suppliers
Frontend: Supplier detail shows 'Flujo de Productos' banner with stats
Frontend: Supplier detail shows 'Seleccionar Todos' button
Frontend: Supplier detail shows 'Quitar Todos' button
Frontend: Supplier detail shows 8 category selection buttons with counts
Frontend: Supplier detail shows 'En Productos' column in product table
Frontend: Selecting all products updates banner to 100%
Frontend: Selecting all products shows 'Sí' in En Productos column
Frontend: Selected products appear in Products page
Frontend: Deselecting all products resets to 0%
critical_code_review_comments: Setup page correctly checks API status before showing form or redirecting
Product selection flow properly updates is_selected field in database
products-unified endpoint correctly filters by is_selected=true by default
Category buttons show real-time selection counts (selected/total)
Empty Products page provides clear guidance to go to Suppliers
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing suppliers and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features (Setup page and Product Selection) are fully functional. Setup page redirects to /login when app is already configured. Product selection flow: Go to Suppliers -> Click 'Ver catálogo' -> Use 'Seleccionar Todos' or category buttons to select products -> Products appear in /products page. The is_selected field controls visibility in products-unified endpoint.

setup_page.superadmin_creation: API tested - correctly rejects when exists

product_selection_flow.flujo_productos_banner: Verified - shows selection stats with percentage
